subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabli-Taqi! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of Grandeur, from the right hand of the luminous Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد قبل تقی ان استمع الندا من شطر الکبریاء یمین البقعه النورآء من
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
